customer-support.name: Customer Support Agent
customer-support.shortDescription: Handles live chat, email, complaints, and order tracking 24/7 with empathy and speed.
customer-support.fullDescription: Our Customer Support Agent is trained to handle the full spectrum of customer service tasks. From live chat and email responses to complaint resolution and order tracking, this agent delivers fast, accurate, and empathetic support around the clock. It learns your products, policies, and brand voice to provide consistent, on-brand responses every time.
useCases: E-commerce stores needing 24/7 customer support
SaaS companies handling technical support queries
Hospitality businesses managing guest inquiries
Retail brands processing returns and exchanges

sales-sdr.name: Sales Development Rep
sales-sdr.shortDescription: Generates leads, sends cold outreach, drafts proposals, and keeps your CRM updated.
sales-sdr.fullDescription: This AI SDR automates the most time-consuming parts of the sales process. It researches prospects, crafts personalized outreach emails, follows up systematically, updates your CRM, and schedules meetings with qualified leads. It's like having a tireless SDR that never misses a follow-up.
useCases: B2B companies scaling outbound sales
Startups building their sales pipeline
Agencies generating leads for clients
Real estate firms prospecting new listings

social-media.name: Social Media Manager
social-media.shortDescription: Plans content, writes posts, moderates comments, and delivers analytics reports.
social-media.fullDescription: Your AI Social Media Manager handles everything from content planning and post creation to comment moderation and analytics reporting. It stays on top of trends, optimizes posting times, and maintains consistent engagement across all your social channels.
useCases: Brands maintaining active social media presence
Marketing agencies managing multiple client accounts
E-commerce stores driving social traffic
Restaurants and cafes engaging local audiences

bookkeeping.name: Bookkeeping Assistant
bookkeeping.shortDescription: Processes invoices, tracks expenses, generates reports, and sends tax reminders.
bookkeeping.fullDescription: Finn is your AI accounting and tax consultant specialized in Turkish tax law and accounting standards. Creates invoices with KDV (VAT) and withholding calculations, computes payroll with SGK deductions, generates financial statements in Excel, parses e-Invoice XML files, tracks the tax calendar, and provides Turkish SME-focused accounting guidance.
useCases: Turkish SMEs creating invoices with KDV calculations
Companies tracking payroll and SGK contributions
Export businesses creating proforma and shipping instructions
Businesses generating financial reports and tax returns

scheduling.name: Appointment & Scheduling Agent
scheduling.shortDescription: Manages bookings, sends reminders, handles rescheduling, and follows up on no-shows.
scheduling.fullDescription: This AI scheduling agent manages your entire appointment workflow. It handles online booking, sends automated reminders, manages rescheduling and cancellations, follows up on no-shows, and maintains waitlists. Perfect for service-based businesses.
useCases: Clinics and healthcare providers
Salons and spas managing appointments
Consultants scheduling client calls
Restaurants handling reservations

hr-recruiting.name: HR & Recruiting Assistant
hr-recruiting.shortDescription: Screens resumes, shortlists candidates, schedules interviews, and manages onboarding.
hr-recruiting.fullDescription: The HR & Recruiting Assistant streamlines your entire hiring pipeline. It screens resumes against your criteria, shortlists top candidates, coordinates interview scheduling, prepares onboarding documents, and posts jobs across multiple platforms.
useCases: Growing companies scaling their team
HR departments processing high volumes
Recruiting agencies managing client pipelines
Startups hiring their first employees

data-analyst.name: Data Analyst Agent
data-analyst.shortDescription: Cleans data, generates reports, builds dashboards, and tracks KPIs automatically.
data-analyst.fullDescription: Your AI Data Analyst handles data cleaning, report generation, dashboard creation, trend analysis, KPI tracking, and anomaly detection. It turns raw data into actionable insights without you needing to write a single formula.
useCases: Marketing teams analyzing campaign performance
Operations teams monitoring business metrics
Finance teams creating regular reports
Product teams tracking user behavior

ecommerce-ops.name: E-Commerce Operations Agent
ecommerce-ops.shortDescription: Manages product listings, inventory alerts, price monitoring, and review responses.
ecommerce-ops.fullDescription: This AI agent manages your e-commerce operations end to end. From product listing optimization and inventory alerts to competitor price monitoring, review responses, and order tracking, it keeps your online store running smoothly 24/7.
useCases: E-commerce brands selling on Trendyol, Shopify, Amazon
Marketplace sellers managing multi-platform stock & pricing
D2C brands scaling shipping and order operations
Businesses optimizing product listings and review management

real-estate.name: Real Estate & Property Agent
real-estate.shortDescription: Finds apartments, evaluates listings, analyzes neighborhoods, reviews leases, and manages property operations.
real-estate.fullDescription: Reno is your AI real estate consultant specialized in the Turkish property market. Searches Sahibinden, Hepsiemlak and Emlakjet, provides title deed (tapu) and occupancy permit (iskan) guidance, advises on rental law (Turkish Code of Obligations 6098), performs neighborhood analysis and property valuation. Calculates Turkish real estate costs including DASK earthquake insurance, title fees, and agent commissions.
useCases: Tenants and buyers searching the Turkish real estate market
Landlords needing rental contract and increase rate advice
Investors performing property valuation and neighborhood analysis
Real estate professionals needing title deed and DASK information

logistics.name: Logistics & Supply Chain Agent
logistics.shortDescription: Compares cargo prices, tracks shipments, finds suppliers, and calculates logistics costs.
logistics.fullDescription: Dora is your AI logistics and supply chain specialist for the Turkish market. Compares shipping prices across Aras Kargo, MNG, Yurtiçi, PTT, UPS, FedEx, and DHL. Tracks shipments, searches for suppliers via web research, and calculates total logistics costs including freight, KDV (VAT), insurance, and customs duties. Specialized in Turkish domestic and international logistics.
useCases: E-commerce businesses comparing shipping providers
Export companies calculating total logistics costs
Businesses finding reliable suppliers in Turkey
Companies tracking shipments across multiple carriers

testimonials.text: The social media manager AI keeps all 12 of our client accounts active and engaging. We've scaled without hiring.

faqItems.question: What exactly is an AI worker?
faqItems.answer: An AI worker is a pre-trained artificial intelligence agent designed to perform specific business tasks autonomously. Think of it as a digital team member that specializes in a particular role — customer support, sales, bookkeeping, etc. — and works 24/7 without breaks.

faqItems.question: How is this different from ChatGPT or other AI tools?
faqItems.answer: Unlike general-purpose AI tools, our AI workers are pre-trained and fine-tuned for specific business roles. They integrate directly with your existing tools (CRM, helpdesk, etc.), maintain context across conversations, and are designed to handle real business workflows end-to-end — not just answer questions.

faqItems.question: Will AI workers replace my human employees?
faqItems.answer: No. Our AI workers are designed to augment your team, not replace it. They handle repetitive, time-consuming tasks so your human employees can focus on strategy, creativity, and relationship-building — the things humans do best.

faqItems.question: How do you integrate with my existing systems?
faqItems.answer: We support integrations with 50+ popular tools including CRMs (HubSpot, Salesforce), helpdesks (Zendesk, Intercom), communication tools (WhatsApp, Slack), and more. Our team handles the entire integration process for you.

faqItems.question: Is my data secure?
faqItems.answer: Absolutely. We use enterprise-grade encryption (AES-256) for data at rest and TLS 1.3 for data in transit. We're SOC 2 compliant, GDPR compliant, and your data is never used to train our models. You own your data, always.

faqItems.question: What happens if the AI makes a mistake?
faqItems.answer: Our AI workers have built-in confidence thresholds. When they're unsure, they escalate to a human team member. You can set custom escalation rules, and our team monitors performance to continuously reduce error rates.

faqItems.question: Can I customize the AI worker for my specific needs?
faqItems.answer: Yes! Professional and Enterprise plans include custom fine-tuning. We can train the AI on your specific products, brand voice, policies, and workflows to ensure it represents your business accurately.

faqItems.question: What's your refund policy?
faqItems.answer: We offer a 14-day free trial with no credit card required. If you're not satisfied after subscribing, we offer a full refund within the first 30 days. No questions asked.

regionInfo.title: China Market Localization
regionInfo.description: Our AI workers are optimized for international and Turkish markets. Below is how each worker applies to the Chinese market.

customer-support.marketNote: Supports WeChat, WeCom, and DingTalk integration scenarios
customer-support.tip: Ideal for multilingual customer service needs of cross-border e-commerce businesses

sales-sdr.marketNote: B2B sales supports Alibaba.com, Made-in-China.com platforms
sales-sdr.tip: Especially suited for China-Turkey trade and Belt & Road market B2B business

social-media.marketNote: Content strategy for international platforms with Chinese content creation
social-media.tip: Great for brand content targeting overseas Chinese communities or international markets

bookkeeping.marketNote: Currently focused on Turkish tax and accounting standards (KDV, SGK, etc.)
bookkeeping.tip: Ideal for Chinese companies doing business in Turkey for tax and invoice management

scheduling.marketNote: Calendar management supports multi-timezone for cross-border team coordination
scheduling.tip: Perfect for meeting scheduling and timezone management between China and Turkey (UTC+8 vs UTC+3)

hr-recruiting.marketNote: Recruitment pipeline supports international and Turkish talent markets
hr-recruiting.tip: Suitable for Chinese companies hiring local staff in Turkey or managing cross-border teams

data-analyst.marketNote: Data analysis supports universal formats like Excel and CSV with Chinese chart labels
data-analyst.tip: Great for analyzing cross-border e-commerce data, market trends, and business KPIs

ecommerce-ops.marketNote: Supports Trendyol, Shopify and other platform store operations
ecommerce-ops.tip: Ideal for cross-border e-commerce sellers operating on Turkish and international platforms

real-estate.marketNote: Focused on Turkish real estate market analysis and property search
real-estate.tip: Suitable for Chinese investors buying property in Turkey — covers title deeds, DASK insurance, and rental law

logistics.marketNote: Compares Turkish domestic and international cargo providers with cost breakdowns
logistics.tip: Ideal for China-Turkey trade logistics — freight cost comparison, customs guidance, and supplier sourcing
